title: aira elegans
intro: Aira elegans, also known as silver hair grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Aira elegans include its ability to improve digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Aira elegans can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusion, where the dried flowers and leaves are steeped in hot water to create a tea, or as a poultice, where the plant material is applied topically to the affected area.
